title: All Out War
description: A Modern Warfare Pack with Create, Flight, Custom vehicles, Etc.
body:
A Modern War modpack. Start with your Iron tools and weapons, upgrade your 'Sticks' over time and eventually drop a Nuke on whatever/whomever you please. Build, Explore, Fight, Destroy. From the Classic Create Mod, to Alex's Caves and Decoration from Chipped and Supplementaries, Build what you want, how you want, when you want.

[Server Packs](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1at3S9E--B7SFDlA1ThoZjFVOR_2GzSog?usp=sharing)
